calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES on WED-AUG-05-2015:
Pierre G. Basmaji, Esq. (415.409.9804), for Appellants / Defendants BLANCA PENA and ROLANDO PENA, who are also present;
Andres M. Sanchez, Esq. of M.C. HALL & ASSOCIATES, P.C. (415.512.9865) for Plaintiff / Respondent LUKE DOUGLAS COLLIER, who is also present.

9:45 AM: This cause comes on calendar this day, as assigned by the Presiding Judge, for trial de novo.

Rosemary Rodriguez is sworn to interpret Spanish into English and English into Spanish for Appellants / Defendants Blanca Pena and Rolando Pena. All litigants are sworn to testify.

The parties stipulate to the admission of Plaintiff's Exhibits contained in Plaintiff's Trial Brief as follows:
Exhibit 1 - Residential Lease and Deposit Receipt
Exhibit 2 - Letter dated May 2, 2015
Exhibit 3 - Letters dated May 5, 2014 and May 7, 2014
Exhibit 4 - Statement (Rent Ledger)
Exhibit 5 - Pictures of Carpet Damage
Exhibit 6 - Pictures of Paint Damage
Exhibit 7 - Pictures of Kitchen Floor Damage
Exhibit 8 - Checks to Contractor
Exhibit 9 - Picture of the washer and dryer from May 2, 2014
Exhibit 10 - Picture of the empty spot where the washer and dryer were before defendants removed them
Exhibit 11 - Notice of Disposition of Security Deposit
Exhibit 12 - 30 Day Notice to Vacate

9:48 AM: Blanca Pena, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced: Exhibits 11, 8, and 12.
10:01 AM: Cross examinination by Mr. Sanchez commences. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit 1.
10:15 AM: The Court examines Ms. Pena.
10:18 AM: Follow-up questions are directed to Ms. Pena by Mr. Sanchez.

10:19 AM: Luke Douglas Collier, Plaintiff/Respondent, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced: Exhibits 4, 9, 10, 5, 6, 7, 8, and 11.

10:32 AM: Cross examination of Mr. Collier by Mr. Basmaji commences. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit 8.
10:37 AM: Re-direct examination by Mr. Sanchez commences.
10:38 AM: Re-Cross examination by Mr. Basmaji commences.
10:38 AM: Recess.

10:50 AM: The Court hears argument regarding Civil Code 1950.5.

10:55 AM: At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All trial exhibits are returned to the offering party.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported; Dept. 613.
